name: Botany Book
description: Notes During the 2020 event, this item could be obtained from the Tinkerer in exchange for 40 Golden Eggs. It could also drop from the Wine Cellar event chest.
effects: Heal: 150 (+0.935 per VIT over 45) HP Party Effect: Healing [75/s] (+0.4675 per VIT over 45) for 4.4 seconds Effect on Self: Removes negative status effects
